features: CHEMICAL FREE: Nuage Reuseable Makeup cloth only requires water to help remove all types of cosmetics with ease. Cosmetics without chemicals! Suitable for sensitive skin
DAILY USE: Clean skin quickly and easily daily at home or on holiday. Super soft durable cleansing cloth lifts away makeup, oil and daily pollutants
FACE AND EYES: The Nuage Reuseable Makeup cloth is perfect to use on the whole face and it will remove cosmetic makeup, eye make up and mascara
PERFECT FOR TRAVEL: Reduce cosmetic travel contents, leave bottles of cleansers at home, pack the Nuage Reuseable Makeup cloth and add water to use each time
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Reuseable single cloth
description: Nuage Reuseable Makeup cloth only requires water to help remove all types of cosmetics with ease. Clean skin quickly and easily daily at home or on holiday. Super soft durable cleansing cloth lifts away makeup, oil and daily pollutants. Cosmetics without chemicals! Suitable for sensitive skin. Reuseable single cloth.
